---
title: "Contact"
image: thumbnail.jpg
about:
  template: broadside
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/RikikilLeGob
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://genomic.social/
---

If you have any problem that I can help you with, I would be glad to help!
